nasb.text: A third of mankind was killed by these three plagues, by the fire and the smoke and the brimstone which proceeded out of their mouths.

esv.text: By these three plagues a third of mankind was killed, by the fire and smoke and sulfur coming out of their mouths.

cnv.text: 馬口中噴出來的火、煙和硫磺這三種災害，殺死了人類的三分之一。

ccb.text: 马口中喷出的这三样灾害杀死了世上三分之一的人口。

csbs.text: 由于这三样灾害，就是从马口中所喷出的火、烟、硫磺，人类的三分之一被杀了。
